name: Scalloped Potatoes W/Cream
recipeIngredient: 3/4 Pound Russet Potatoes (Peel and cut into 1/8-inch slices)
recipeInstructions:
1. Position the rack in the center of the oven and preheat to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Rub half of the butter over a 9-inch round glass pie plate. Arrange one-third of the potatoes in the prepared dish. Season with salt and pepper. Repeat layering and seasoning with remaining potatoes in two batches.
3. Whisk together 1/3 cup cream and broth in a small bowl. Pour over the potatoes. Dot the top with 1 tablespoon butter.
4. Bake until golden, about 55 minutes.
5. Drizzle 3 tablespoons cream over the potatoes. Bake until the top is golden and the potatoes are tender, about 15 more minutes. Transfer to a rack and cool for 5 minutes.
This recipe yields 4 servings.
